sections.heading: Overshoot response
sections.text: When overshoot remains high after reasonable gain reduction, prefer adding an inner current loop, feedforward, or saturation management before forcing more integral action.

sections.heading: Slow settling response
sections.text: When settling time repeatedly fails, first check whether the control structure is too simple for the plant. A loop-structure change is often better than uniformly increasing gains.

sections.heading: Ripple response
sections.text: When ripple violations persist, examine passive sizing and switching ripple paths first; controller gain changes alone rarely remove steady ripple limitations.
